title: Pouvoirs britanniques
text_preview: Whereas, for the better treating of and arranging certain matters which are now in discussion, or which may come into discussion, between the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and the Governments of other Powers and States relative to the establishment of a European Plant Protection Organisation, it is expedient that a fit person should be invested with Full Power to conduct the…

pages.text:
Whereas, for the better treating of and arranging certain matters which are now in discussion, or which may come into discussion, between the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and the Governments of other Powers and States relative to the establishment of a

European Plant Protection Organisation, it is expedient that a fit person should be invested with Full Power to conduct the said discussion on the part of the Government of the United

Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland: I, Herbert

Stanley Morrison a Member of His Majesty's Privy Council, &c., 'c., His Maiesty's Principal Secretary of State for Foreign

Affairs, do hereby certify that John Hensley, Esquire, an

Assistant Secretary in His Majesty's Ministry of Agriculture and Fisheries, is by these Presents named, constituted and appointed as Plenipotentiary and Representative having Full

Power and Authority to agree and conclude with such Plenipot- entiaries or Representatives as may be vested with sinilar

Power ald Authority on the part of the Governments of other

Powers and States as aforesaid any Treaty, Convention,

Agreement or other Instrument that may tend to the attainment of the above-mentioned end, and to sign for the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, everything so agreed upon and concluded. Further, I do hereby certify that whatever things shall be so transacted and

concluded by the said Plenipotentiary and Representative, shall, subject it necessary to Ratification by the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, be agreed to, acknowledged and accepted by the said Governient of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland in the fullest manner.

In witness whereof I have signed these Presents and affixed hereto my Seal.

Signed and sealed at the Foreign Office, London, the

Thirteenth day of April in the Year of Our Lord, One Thousand

Nine hundred and Fifty-one.

Hater Memin.
